1: # Dedicated Invoice Manager Dashboard & Calculations
2: 
3: Create a dedicated **Invoice Manager** page in the admin panel sidebar (with a `Receipt` icon). This page will be organized category-wise (Store Products, One Rupee Pujas, Vedic/All Pujas, Combo/Festival Pujas, and Health/Wealth Problem Pujas) and allow editing section-wide defaults as well as specific item overrides in a unified place.
4: 
5: ---
6: 
7: ## User Review Required
8: 
9: > [!IMPORTANT]
10: > - A migration script [20260615000000_dynamic_invoice_settings.sql](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/migrations/20260615000000_dynamic_invoice_settings.sql) is updated to include the `invoice_settings` JSONB column on `problem_poojas` and `combo_poojas` tables.
11: > - Client-side code is designed with full schema-resilient fallback: if the column has not been added yet to a table in your Supabase database, editing individual overrides will fail gracefully with a descriptive notification rather than crashing, and calculations will gracefully fall back to global settings.
12: 
13: ---
14: 
15: ## Proposed Changes
16: 
17: ### Database Schema
18: 
19: #### [MODIFY] [20260615000000_dynamic_invoice_settings.sql](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/migrations/20260615000000_dynamic_invoice_settings.sql)
20: 1. Add `invoice_settings JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb` to:
21:    - `public.one_rupee_poojas`
22:    - `public.general_poojas`
23:    - `public.problem_poojas`
24:    - `public.combo_poojas`
25:    - `public.website_pooja_products`
26: 2. Seed

66: Remove the duplicate `6. Invoice Settings` tab from the general pooja editor form.
67: 
68: #### [MODIFY] [WebsiteProductsManagerPage.jsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/App_admin/src/WebsiteProductsManagerPage.jsx)
69: Remove the duplicate `Invoice Settings` tab from the product editor form.
70: 
71: ---
72: 
73: ### Mobile Application
74: 
75: #### [MODIFY] [CartContext.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/context/CartContext.tsx)
76: 1. Ensure the dynamic metadata fetch queries select `invoice_settings` for general pujas, ₹1 pujas, combo/festival pujas, products, and problem pujas.
77: 2. Store `invoice_settings` in the items structure cached inside CartContext.
78: 
79: #### [MODIFY] [cart.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/cart.tsx)
80: 1. Map dynamic calculations using the new structure:
81:    - Identify table source (`one_rupee_poojas`, `general_poojas`, `problem_poojas`, `combo_poojas`, `website_pooja_products`) to apply the correct category default parameters.
82:    - Check if the item has specific override values in its `invoice_settings` (with `override_global: true`).
83:    - Use the appropriate values to perform item-specific promotional discounts, tax/GST additions, and delivery threshold calculations.
84: 
85: ---
86: 
87: ## Verification Plan
88: 
89: ### Automated Tests
90: - Build verification using `npm run build` in `App_admin` workspace.
91: - No automated browser tests (per user rule).
92: 
93: ### Manual Verification
94: - Navigate to the **Invoice Manager** page in Admin.
95: - Change global values for different categories and verify database updates.
96: - Toggle individual overrides on items, configure values, save, and confirm database row updates.
97: - Check price rendering and discounts in the checkout cart of the mobile app.
98:
